chunks.doc_name: Dexcom beats Street in Q4 on 13% sales growth
chunks.text: [MassDevice](https://www.massdevice.com/) The Medical Device Business Journal — Medical Device News & Articles | MassDevice # Dexcom beats Street in Q4 on 13% sales growth February 12, 2026 By [Sean Whooley](https://www.massdevice.com/author/sean-whooley/) ![Dexcom updated Logo](https://www.massdevice.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/Dexcom-updated-Logo-300x195.jpg)[Dexcom](https://www.drugdeliverybusiness.com/tag/dexcom/) (Nasdaq: DXCM) + shares ticked up after hours today on fourth-quarter results that came in ahead of the consensus forecast. ![Dexcom updated Logo](https://www.massdevice.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/Dexcom-updated-Logo-300x195.jpg) Shares of DXCM rose 1% to $65.70 apiece in post-market trading today. The San Diego-based continuous glucose monitor (CGM) maker reported profits of $267.3 million. That equals 68¢ per share on sales of $1.259 billion for the three months ended Dec. 31, 2025. Highlights in the quarter include the [launch of the Dexcom G7 15 Day](https://www.drugdeliverybusiness.com/dexcom-launch-g7-15-day-cgm-december/), the company’s longest-wear CGM offering. That launch also included insulin delivery pairings with [Insulet](https://www.drugdeliverybusiness.com/insulet-makes-omnipod-5-available-with-dexcom-g7-15-day-cgm/) and [Beta Bionics](https://www.drugdeliverybusiness.com/beta-bionics-ilet-dexcom-g7-15day-cgm/). The company also won FDA clearance for its [smart CGM-integrated basal dosing optimizer](https://www.drugdeliverybusiness.com/dexcom-fda-cgm-basal-dosing-t2d/). [***Get the full story at our sister site, Drug Delivery Business News.***](https://www.drugdeliverybusiness.com/dexcom-beats-street-q4-2025-growth/) Filed Under: [Business/Financial News](https://www.massdevice.com/category/business_financial_news/), [Diabetes](https://www.massdevice.com/category/diabetes-etc/), [Drug-Device Combinations](https://www.massdevice.com/category/drug_device_combinations/), [Health Technology](https://www.massdevice.com/category/hightechnology/), [MassDevice Earnings Roundup](https://www.massdevice.com/category/business_financial_news/massdevice_com_earnings_roundup/), [Patient Monitoring](https://www.massdevice.com/category/patient_monitoring/), [Wall Street Beat](https://www.massdevice.com/category/business_financial_news/wall_street_beat/) Tagged With: [Dexcom](https://www.massdevice.com/tag/dexcom/) ### More recent news ![](https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/bdd595661a8745ce044cf2fa279ab3d25f8c630ad663d21505374081518941cd?s=70&d=retro&r=g) #### About Sean Whooley Sean Whooley is a senior editor who mainly produces work for MassDevice, Medical Design & Outsourcing and Drug Delivery Business News. He received a bachelor's degree in multiplatform journalism from the University of Maryland, College Park.
